backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages customer enquiries with methods to submit, retrieve all, and retrieve a single enquiry by index.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the Hero section tagline styling update (bold serif font, golden-amber color) to its affected file and test ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose, styling, and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Adarshpatel Marketing' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, DairyFeedSection, AgriInputsSection, CoffeeTradingSection, ContactSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AgriInputsSectio: Agri Inputs section displaying six product cards (fertilizers, seeds, pesticides, soil care) on a deep forest-green gradient background with vibrant category badges and enquiry CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/CoffeeTradingSec: Coffee Trading section showcasing four Karnataka coffee products on a dark coffee-brown background with grade/origin labels, amber CTA buttons, and a decorative background image.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact and enquiry form section with validation, backend submission via the useSubmitEnquiry hook, and a WhatsApp redirect on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/DairyFeedSection: Renders a section showcasing six dairy feed products as cards with badges, descriptions, features, and an enquiry button that scrolls to the contact section or triggers a callback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with the brand logo, quick navigation links, and contact details (phone, email, address) in a three-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, company logo, tagline, and buttons to scroll to the products or contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the company logo, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu; changes style on scroll.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitEnquiry` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitEnquiry` method and invalidates the enquiries query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Fraunces, DM Sans), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines an earthy agricultural OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS variables, plus utility classes for text shadows and font families.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom earthy/agri color palettes using OKLCH values, Fraunces/DM Sans font families, custom border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, feature history, and configuration for the Adarshpatel Marketing project, currently at schema version 1.0.0 with one existing hero tagline styling feature.
